query: direct on-camera flash snapshot harsh shadow red eye unflattering party
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: Two children stand in front of a solid green backdrop decorated with draped red metallic tinsel garlands. The taller child on the right wears a purple paper crown, a blue and white striped short-sleeve shirt, and beige cargo pants while flexing their right arm. The smaller child on the left wears an oversized turquoise long-sleeve shirt with a graphic print and a large red bow on their head. Both children face the camera with broad smiles.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Two children stand in front of a solid green backdrop decorated with draped red metallic tinsel garlands in a snapshot-style portrait illuminated by harsh direct flash. The taller child on the right wears a purple paper crown, a blue and white striped short-sleeve shirt, and beige cargo pants while flexing their right arm. The smaller child on the left wears an oversized turquoise long-sleeve shirt with a graphic print and a large red bow on their head. Both children face the camera with broad smiles, with the aggressive lighting casting sharp, dark shadows on the backdrop behind them.
